case_title: FIRST USA BANK A NATIONAL BANKING ASSOCIATION vs. MURPHY, DWIGHT et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST USA BANK A NATIONAL BANKING ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT MURPHY, DWIGHT DOES I THROUGH X, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          FEB-16-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-20-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JAN-27-1994
OSC CALENDAR OF APR-18-1994, OFF CALENDAR
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST USA BANK A NATIONAL BANKING ASSOCIATION

OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-18-1994, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAR-18-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-18-1994 CONTINUED FROM MAR-18-1994 TO APR-18-1994 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-16-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON FEB-16-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR MAR-18-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
